name: ExtensionMedicinalProductDefinition_CrossReference_Type
title: R5: The type of relationship, for instance branded to generic or virtual to actual product (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `MedicinalProductDefinition.crossReference.type` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`MedicinalProductDefinition.crossReference.type` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `MedicinalProductDefinition.crossReference.type` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`
*  R4B: `MedicinalProductDefinition.crossReference.type` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `MedicinalProductDefinition.crossReference.type` has a context of MedicinalProduct.crossReference based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `MedicinalProduct`.
Element `MedicinalProductDefinition.crossReference.type` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: The type of relationship, for instance branded to generic or virtual to actual product
element.definition: The type of relationship, for instance branded to generic, virtual to actual product, product to development product (investigational), parallel import version.

binding.description: Extra measures defined for a Medicinal Product, such as heightened reporting requirements.
